headline: AI Social Listening: Brand Monitoring, Sentiment Analysis, and Consumer Insights
description: AI social listening hears everything the world says about your brand -- from millions of tweets and reviews to logo appearances in photos. Sentiment analysis, trend detection, and crisis alerting transform unstructured social chatter into actionable consumer intelligence.

citation.name: AI Social Listening and Consumer Intelligence: NLP, Sentiment Analysis, and Visual Recognition (2024-2025 Survey)
Computer Vision for Social Media Analytics: Logo Detection, Scene Understanding, and Visual Brand Tracking
